svg.text: MILAN AVB NIC on VexiiRiscv SoC — FULL SYSTEM MAP (hierarchical) · AX7101 xc7a100t (Arty deltas noted) · data flows LEFT->RIGHT (wire -> fabric -> SoC -> DRAM; TX lane returns) · BIG arrows = frame/bus data, thin dashed = configuration/status · 2026-07-12
lanes: LE = little (tdata[7:0] = first byte) · BE = big (AECP parser only) · BIG arrow = data/frames · thin dashed = config/status · big dashed = monitor copy
clocks: osc 200 -> PLL: cd_sys 100 · cd_sys4x 400+dqs90 (DDR3-800) · cd_idelay 200 · cd_milan 100 (Arty 50) · eth_rx/eth_tx 125
crossings: AXI-Lite CSR sys<->milan · MAC dual-clock FIFOs eth<->milan · DMA engines in sys, AXIS FIFOs to milan
down-pending 8 · general-slots 16 · coherent DMA lands here
PLIC + CLINT — IRQs: kl-eth per-queue · milan_csr o_irq_csr · UART · timer
kl-eth DMA engines (fabric, cd_sys, coherent port into L2)
ring ctl · RSC tout · steer/hash · IRQ status
kl-eth driver (kl,dma-ether · silicon; MODULE_VERSION gates identity)
• 2 RX queues x threaded NAPI · RSC ON @250 us (ethtool -C rx-usecs live)
• 4-slot RX + pop-ordered CQ · 60 KB order-4 buffers (mslot60)
linuxptp: ptp4l (802.1AS BMCA, servo) + phc2sys — in the rootfs, unvalidated until the PHC lands;
then a small bridge writes GM id/domain -> CSR 0x624/0x628 on change (fabric re-advertises + AS_PATH truth)
PipeWire module-avb (future media plane): crafts AAF frames -> kl-eth -> fabric CBS class-A queue ·
SRP/MSRP state machines · ACMP connection POLICY via mailbox (HW answers / SW decides)
validation peers (via the AVB switch): milan_controller.py · la_avdecc enum-probe (Hive's library) · tsn-gen
DDR3 SDRAM — MT41K256M16 x16 · 512 MB @ 0x4000_0000 (off-chip, DDR3-800)
TX descriptor ring — 512 x 8 B = 4 KB
descriptor: {addr, len, flags, TX ts window @ +0x3100}
RX rings (per queue x2) — 4 slots x 60 pages x 16 KB = 960 KB
build_r2slots STRICT pairing) · header-split pages: header in
slot, payload in 16 KB pages · RX ts in descriptor window
any DRAM row miss costs 1424 ns (50% TLB + 50% DRAM) —
milan_datapath — fabric, cd_milan 100 MHz (Arty: 50 MHz) · ALL AXIS links: 64b tdata + 8b tkeep + tvalid/tready/tlast, LE unless marked BE
— the M-A3 'no frame on the wire' root cause
Arty: LiteEthPHYMII (100M) · is_1g=0 -> CBS slope wiring pending
PTP counter + CSR regs — 64b counter FF
event capture fed by MAC pulses
ATDECC control plane — zero-CPU responders (ADP · AECP · ACMP)
GET_AVB_INFO · GET_COUNTERS (136 B, full-size on errors) ·
AEM store — BRAM 808 B (byte port 8b, addr 16b, 1-cycle latency)
directory 5 x 64b FF {type, idx, base, len}:
overlay: live CSR wins (eid, MAC, caps, avail_idx, cfg, clock_id)
GET_TX_STATE -> SUCCESS, count=0, stream fields zeroed,
softcore policy mailbox (HW answers / SW decides)
82 B ADPDU (CDL 0x38) · periodic every valid_time s
discover response · available_index +1 on EVERY ADPDU
enable-edge with link already up == link_up (boot-order fix)
addr 16b) · cd_sys side, CDC into cd_milan
o_irq_csr -> PLIC · identity fans out to ADP + AEM +
ACMP: ONE source of wire truth
TX pipeline (DMA -> shaped wire; control merged in gaps)
frame gaps only: zero mid-frame jitter ·
TX lane flows RIGHT -> LEFT (back to the wire): TX reader (SoC) -> classifier -> queues -> CBS -> PTP TX stamp -> datapath merge -> MAC -> PHY · all hops 64b AXIS LE k8
ADPDU 82 B subtype 0xFA · CDL 0x38(56) · entity_id@18 · caps@34 · avail_idx@50 · gm@54 ·
AECPDU var. subtype 0xFB · CDL = frame-26 (base 12; counts after target_eid@18) · controller@26 ·
seq@34 · u/cmd@36 · payload@38 · LE on wire (parser chain BE) · runt pad to 60
ACMPDU 70 B subtype 0xFC · CDL 44 · stream_id@18 · controller@26 · talker@34 · listener@42 ·
uids@50/52 · dmac@54 · count@60 · seq@62 · flags@64 · vlan@66 · rsvd@68
multicast 91:E0:F0:01:00:00 (ADP+ACMP) · AVTP ethertype 0x22F0 · min wire frame 60 B
keeper: build_ax7101_eto_aecp7 (WNS +0.091) la_avdecc AECP-clean · acmp2 sweep IN FLIGHT (Milan=1 gate)
sim: aecp 68/68 · acmp 41/41 · adp 121/121 · milan_dp 26/26 · cosim 42/42 · lint 11/11 · yosys 20/20
silicon: controller 26/26 (31 w/ ACMP staged) · la_avdecc ONLINE, IEEE17221=1, zero AEM complaints
perf: TX 186 (reader-bound) · RX 223 (-P2) / 209 · ADP through the switch TX 83 / RX 94 (100M port)
next: ACMP silicon (Milan=1) · kl-eth PHC (gPTP) · TX reader prefetch · AF_XDP · 1-hart decision
Arty A7-100 deltas: sys 83.333 MHz · cd_milan 50 MHz · LiteEthPHYMII (DP83848, 100M) · is_1g=0
CBS slope wiring pending · keeper build_arty_v7 (WNS +0.018) · QSPI S25FL128S (1-1-1 0x03 reads)
boot: flashboot full set (opensbi_arty: 2 harts, timer 83333000, arty dtb embedded)
driver pairing: insmod kl-eth hs_pgsz=16384 rsc_clk_mhz=50 · two-node ADP discovery VERIFIED
